fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY, a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, is highlighted as one of ten leveraged ETFs built to lose value. This suggests a bearish outlook for the instrument, likely due to its inherent decay and the specific market conditions or strategies that make it prone to underperformance over time. Investors should be aware of the high risk and potential for significant losses associated with such complex products.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: $UVXY Adding big here going into the close!!!!
$UVXY Always wait for the spike then short.
